source: proposifyai
client_company: "Dr. Sweta Adatia / NeuroSense360"
client_name: "Dr. Sweta Adatia / NeuroSense360"
client_email: ""
title: "Neurosense360 AICoPilot CR4 TechCommercial"
proposal_status: "draft"
template_id: null
ai_confidence_score: 0
created_at: 2026-05-14T12:28:28.049121+00:00
pricing_total: null
project: Proposals
---# Neurosense360 AICoPilot CR4 TechCommercial

**Client:** Dr. Sweta Adatia / NeuroSense360
**Status:** draft  ·  **Created:** 2026-05-14

---

{
  "rawHtml": "<!DOCTYPE html>\n<html lang=\"en\">\n<head>\n<meta charset=\"UTF-8\">\n<title>AI Brain Coach Co-Pilot CR4 — BTR-2026-NS-03</title>\n<style>\n* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }\nbody { font-family: 'Segoe UI', Arial, sans-serif; background: #e8e8e8; color: #1C2B4A; }\n.page { width: 210mm; height: 297mm; overflow: hidden; margin: 10px auto; background: white; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); display: flex; flex-direction: column; }\n@media print { body { background: white; } .page { margin: 0; box-shadow: none; page-break-after: always; } .page:last-child { page-break-after: avoid; } @page { size: A4; margin: 0; } }\n:root { --navy: #1C2B4A; --gold: #C9A93F; --text: #374151; --muted: #6B7280; --border: #E5E7EB; --bg: #F8F9FB; }\n.section-badge { font-size: 8.5px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 3px; color: var(--gold); text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px; }\n.section-heading { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--navy); margin-bottom: 8px; line-height: 1.2; }\n.body-content { padding: 18px 30px; }\n.divider { border: none; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); }\n.body-p { font-size: 10px; color: var(--text); line-height: 1.6; margin-bottom: 6px; }\n.body-p:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }\n.fn { font-size: 9px; color: var(--muted); font-style: italic; margin-top: 6px; line-height: 1.5; }\n.page-footer { margin-top: auto; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); padding: 5px 30px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; background: var(--bg); }\n.pf-left { font-size: 8px; color: var(--muted); }\n.pf-right { font-size: 8px; color: var(--muted); font-weight: 600; }\n/* Cover */\n.cover { background: var(--navy); height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; padding: 44px 44px 36px; position: relative; overflow: hidden; }\n.cover::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: -80px; right: -80px; width: 360px; height: 360px; border-radius: 50%; border: 55px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04); }\n.cover::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: -50px; right: 50px; width: 220px; height: 220px; border-radius: 50%; border: 44px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04); }\n.cover-accent { width: 44px; height: 3px; background: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 28px; }\n.cover-label { font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 3.5px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45); text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 14px; }\n.cover-title { font-size: 27px; font-weight: 800; color: white; line-height: 1.18; margin-bottom: 14px; max-width: 490px; }\n.cover-subtitle { font-size: 11px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); line-height: 1.7; max-width: 460px; }\n.cover-meta { margin-top: auto; display: flex; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); padding-top: 24px; }\n.cover-meta-col { flex: 1; padding-right: 16px; }\n.cover-meta-col + .cover-meta-col { border-left: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); padding-left: 16px; padding-right: 0; }\n.cover-meta-label { font-size: 8px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 2.5px; color: var(--gold); text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 5px; }\n.cover-meta-name { font-size: 11.5px; font-weight: 700; color: white; margin-bottom: 3px; }\n.cover-meta-sub { font-size: 9px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); line-height: 1.5; }\n/* CR tag */\n.cr-badge { display: inline-block; background: rgba(201,169,63,0.15); border: 1px solid rgba(201,169,63,0.4); color: var(--gold); font-size: 8px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 2px; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 4px; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 18px; }\n/* Lead quote */\n.lead-quote { border-left: 3px solid var(--gold); padding: 9px 12px; background: var(--bg); border-radius: 0 6px 6px 0; margin: 8px 0; font-size: 10px; line-height: 1.65; color: var(--text); }\n/* Deliverables */\n.deliv-list { list-style: none; padding: 0; }\n.deliv-item { display: flex; gap: 9px; align-items: flex-start; padding: 6px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }\n.deliv-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }\n.d-num { width: 22px; height: 22px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--navy); color: white; font-size: 8.5px; font-weight: 700; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 1px; }\n.d-num.gold { background: var(--gold); }\n.d-title { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--navy); margin-bottom: 2px; }\n.d-desc { font-size: 9px; color: var(--text); line-height: 1.5; }\n/* Two col */\n.two-col { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 10px; }\n/* Flow steps */\n.flow-steps { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 0; margin: 10px 0; }\n.flow-step { flex: 1; text-align: center; position: relative; }\n.flow-step + .flow-step::before { content: '\\2192'; position: absolute; left: -8px; top: 11px; font-size: 14px; color: var(--gold); font-weight: 700; }\n.flow-circle { width: 26px; height: 26px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--navy); color: white; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 800; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin: 0 auto 5px; }\n.flow-label { font-size: 8px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--navy); margin-bottom: 2px; line-height: 1.3; }\n.flow-desc { font-size: 7.5px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.35; }\n/* Sample output card */\n.coach-card { background: var(--bg); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 14px; margin-top: 8px; }\n.coach-card-label { font-size: 8px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 2px; color: var(--gold); text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 6px; }\n.coach-line { font-size: 9.5px; color: var(--text); line-height: 1.6; padding: 3px 0 3px 12px; position: relative; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }\n.coach-line:last-child { border-bottom: none; }\n.coach-line::before { content: '\\25B6'; position: absolute; left: 0; color: var(--gold); font-size: 7px; top: 6px; }\n/* Integration box */\n.integration-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 8px; margin-top: 8px; }\n.int-card { border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 7px; padding: 9px; background: white; }\n.int-title { font-size: 9.5px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--navy); margin-bottom: 4px; }\n.int-desc { font-size: 8.5px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.45; }\n/* Tech row */\n.tech-row { background: var(--bg); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 6px; padding: 6px 10px; margin-top: 8px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; flex-wrap: wrap; }\n.tech-label { font-size: 8px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--navy); white-space: nowrap; }\n.tech-tag { font-size: 8px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--navy); background: rgba(28,43,74,0.08); border: 1px solid rgba(28,43,74,0.15); padding: 1px 6px; border-radius: 3px; }\n/* Price table */\n.price-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin-top: 8px; font-size: 9.5px; }\n.price-table th { background: var(--navy); color: white; padding: 7px 10px; text-align: left; font-size: 8.5px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 1px; }\n.price-table th:last-child { text-align: right; }\n.price-table td { padding: 6px 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--text); vertical-align: top; }\n.price-table td:last-child { text-align: right; font-weight: 700; color: var(--navy); }\n.price-table tr.total-row td { background: var(--navy); color: white; font-weight: 700; font-size: 10.5px; }\n.price-table tr.total-row td:last-child { color: var(--gold); font-size: 13px; }\n/* Payment cards */\n.pay-cards { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 8px; margin-top: 10px; }\n.pay-card { border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 7px; padding: 10px; background: white; text-align: center; }\n.pay-pct { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--gold); }\n.pay-label { font-size: 8.5px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--navy); margin: 2px 0; }\n.pay-desc { font-size: 8.5px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.4; }\n/* Timeline */\n.timeline { position: relative; padding-left: 24px; }\n.timeline::before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 6px; top: 6px; bottom: 6px; width: 2px; background: var(--border); }\n.timeline-item { position: relative; margin-bottom: 10px; }\n.timeline-item:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }\n.timeline-dot { position: absolute; left: -20px; top: 3px; width: 12px; height: 12px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--gold); border: 2px solid white; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--gold); }\n.tl-label { font-size: 8px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 2px; color: var(--gold); text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 1px; }\n.tl-title { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--navy); margin-bottom: 2px; }\n.tl-desc { font-size: 9px; color: var(--text); line-height: 1.5; }\n/* Terms */\n.terms-list { list-style: none; padding: 0; }\n.terms-list li { position: relative; padding: 5px 0 5px 14px; font-size: 9.5px; color: var(--text); line-height: 1.55; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }\n.terms-list li:last-child { border-bottom: none; }\n.terms-list li::before { content: '\\2022'; position: absolute; left: 0; color: var(--gold); font-size: 14px; top: 3px; }\n/* Sig */\n.sig-block { border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 8px; padding: 14px 18px; background: white; margin-top: 8px; }\n.sig-line { border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); margin: 18px 0 5px; width: 200px; }\n.sig-name { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--navy); }\n.sig-title { font-size: 9px; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 2px; }\n/* Footer */\n.footer-band { background: var(--navy); padding: 14px 30px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; }\n.footer-left .f-email { font-size: 9px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); margin-top: 3px; }\n.footer-center { font-size: 9px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.3); text-align: center; }\n.footer-right { text-align: right; }\n.footer-right .f-client { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--gold); }\n.footer-right .f-address { font-size: 9px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); margin-top: 2px; line-height: 1.4; }\n.footer-confidential { background: #111d35; padding: 5px 30px; font-size: 7.5px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 2.5px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.22); text-align: center; text-transform: uppercase; }\n</style>\n</head>\n<body>\n\n<!-- PAGE 1 — COVER -->\n<div class=\"page\">\n  <div class=\"cover\">\n    <img src=\"data:image/jpeg;base64,\" style=\"width:44px;height:44px;object-fit:contain;border-radius:6px;margin-bottom:20px;display:block;\">\n    <div class=\"cover-accent\"></div>\n    <div class=\"cr-badge\">Change Request 4 &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Neurosense360 Platform</div>\n    <div class=\"cover-label\">Techno-Commercial Proposal</div>\n    <div class=\"cover-title\">AI Brain Coach Co-Pilot Integration into Neurosense360</div>\n    <div class=\"cover-subtitle\">An intelligent, LLM-powered conversational layer embedded into the existing Neurosense360 platform — automatically identifies the patient, retrieves their qEEG report, and delivers a personalised plain-language coaching explanation of findings and recommended interventions.</div>\n    <div style=\"margin-top: 26px; display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap:wrap;\">\n      <div style=\"background: rgba(201,169,63,0.15); border: 1px solid rgba(201,169,63,0.3); border-radius: 4px; padding: 6px 14px; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--gold); letter-spacing: 1.5px;\">10 WORKING DAYS</div>\n      <div style=\"background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border-radius: 4px; padding: 6px 14px; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); letter-spacing: 1.5px;\">AED 4,500</div>\n      <div style=\"background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border-radius: 4px; padding: 6px 14px; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); letter-spacing: 1.5px;\">EXISTING PLATFORM — ADDITIVE CR</div>\n    </div>\n    <div class=\"cover-meta\">\n      <div class=\"cover-meta-col\">\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-label\">Prepared By</div>\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-name\">Biji Thomas</div>\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-sub\">CEO &amp; Principal Consultant<br>Bettroi FZE, Dubai<br>admin@bettroi.com</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"cover-meta-col\">\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-label\">Prepared For</div>\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-name\">Dr. Shweta</div>\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-sub\">Neurosense &amp; Limitless Brain Lab<br>Existing Neurosense360 Platform</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"cover-meta-col\">\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-label\">Reference</div>\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-name\">BTR-2026-NS-03</div>\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-sub\">20 April 2026<br>Confidential Document<br>Valid 60 Days</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"cover-meta-col\">\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-label\">Investment</div>\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-name\" style=\"color: var(--gold); font-size: 17px;\">AED 4,500</div>\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-sub\">10 Days &middot; AED 450/day<br>Fixed Price<br>Additive to Existing Platform</div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n\n<!-- PAGE 2 — EXECUTIVE SUMMARY + SCOPE -->\n<div class=\"page\">\n  <div class=\"body-content\" style=\"padding-bottom: 12px;\">\n    <div class=\"section-badge\">01 &mdash; Executive Summary</div>\n    <div class=\"section-heading\">AI Brain Coach — What It Does</div>\n    <div class=\"lead-quote\">\n      Today, when a patient receives their Neurosense360 qEEG report, a human coach is required to interpret and explain the findings. The AI Brain Coach Co-Pilot eliminates this bottleneck — it automatically identifies the patient within the existing platform, retrieves their report, and delivers a personalised, conversational coaching explanation in plain language: what is working well in their neurology, what needs attention, and a prioritised list of recommended interventions.\n    </div>\n    <p class=\"body-p\">This is a <strong>Change Request (CR4)</strong> to the existing Neurosense360 platform — no new platform is being built. The AI co-pilot is embedded as a new module within the current patient-facing interface. It connects to the platform&rsquo;s existing patient database and report storage, invokes an LLM (Claude or Gemini), and returns a structured coaching session to the patient.</p>\n    <p class=\"body-p\">The co-pilot is designed for <strong>first-line explanation</strong> — it handles routine report interpretation autonomously, escalating to a human neurological coach only when clinical complexity warrants. This significantly reduces coaching resource dependency and enables the platform to scale without proportional growth in human coach hours.</p>\n\n    <div style=\"margin-top: 10px;\">\n      <div class=\"section-badge\" style=\"margin-bottom: 6px;\">Patient-Facing Interaction Flow</div>\n      <div class=\"flow-steps\">\n        <div class=\"flow-step\">\n          <div class=\"flow-circle\">1</div>\n          <div class=\"flow-label\">Patient Login</div>\n          <div class=\"flow-desc\">Patient authenticates into existing Neurosense360 portal</div>\n        </div>\n        <div class=\"flow-step\">\n          <div class=\"flow-circle\">2</div>\n          <div class=\"flow-label\">Identity Resolved</div>\n          <div class=\"flow-desc\">AI co-pilot identifies patient from session — no manual entry</div>\n        </div>\n        <div class=\"flow-step\">\n          <div class=\"flow-circle\">3</div>\n          <div class=\"flow-label\">Report Retrieved</div>\n          <div class=\"flow-desc\">Latest qEEG report and scan data fetched from platform storage</div>\n        </div>\n        <div class=\"flow-step\">\n          <div class=\"flow-circle\">4</div>\n          <div class=\"flow-label\">AI Analysis</div>\n          <div class=\"flow-desc\">LLM processes de-identified report metrics and generates coaching context</div>\n        </div>\n        <div class=\"flow-step\">\n          <div class=\"flow-circle\">5</div>\n          <div class=\"flow-label\">Coach Delivery</div>\n          <div class=\"flow-desc\">Personalised explanation delivered in conversational, plain-language format</div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n\n  <hr class=\"divider\">\n\n  <div class=\"body-content\" style=\"padding-top: 10px;\">\n    <div class=\"section-badge\">02 &mdash; Scope of Work</div>\n    <div class=\"section-heading\">CR4 Deliverables</div>\n    <ul class=\"deliv-list\">\n      <li class=\"deliv-item\">\n        <div class=\"d-num\">1</div>\n        <div>\n          <div class=\"d-title\">Patient Identity &amp; Report Retrieval Module</div>\n          <div class=\"d-desc\">Integration with the existing Neurosense360 patient database. On session start, the co-pilot resolves the authenticated patient&rsquo;s identity, fetches their most recent qEEG report and scan metadata from platform storage, and prepares a structured, de-identified summary for LLM consumption. PHI stripped before any data leaves the platform boundary.</div>\n        </div>\n      </li>\n      <li class=\"deliv-item\">\n        <div class=\"d-num\">2</div>\n        <div>\n          <div class=\"d-title\">LLM Analysis &amp; Coaching Engine</div>\n          <div class=\"d-desc\">Structured system prompt encoding Neurosense360&rsquo;s clinical interpretation framework. The LLM receives the de-identified report summary and generates a personalised coaching session covering: (i) findings that are within normal neurophysiological parameters, (ii) findings that require attention with specific improvement pathways, and (iii) a prioritised 1-2-3-4 intervention list (protocol-specific: neuro-breathing, meditation, frequency therapy, nutraceuticals).</div>\n        </div>\n      </li>\n      <li class=\"deliv-item\">\n        <div class=\"d-num\">3</div>\n        <div>\n          <div class=\"d-title\">Conversational Co-Pilot Interface</div>\n          <div class=\"d-desc\">Embedded chat-style UI component within the existing patient portal — no new login, no separate app. The patient can ask follow-up questions about their report. Session-persistent memory within the conversation. Response formatted for readability: headings, bullet points, plain language. No clinical jargon exposed to the patient.</div>\n        </div>\n      </li>\n      <li class=\"deliv-item\">\n        <div class=\"d-num\">4</div>\n        <div>\n          <div class=\"d-title\">Clinical Escalation &amp; Safety Layer</div>\n          <div class=\"d-desc\">Rule-based classifier on every co-pilot response: if query or context exceeds defined clinical complexity thresholds, the co-pilot redirects the patient to a human neurological coach with a pre-drafted escalation summary. Prevents the AI from overstepping into clinical advice territory.</div>\n        </div>\n      </li>\n      <li class=\"deliv-item\">\n        <div class=\"d-num\">5</div>\n        <div>\n          <div class=\"d-title\">LLM Provider Abstraction &amp; HIPAA Controls</div>\n          <div class=\"d-desc\">Provider-agnostic API layer supporting Claude (Anthropic) and Gemini (Google) — switchable without re-engineering. Consent capture on first use. Full audit trail of all AI interactions (patient ID, timestamp, response hash). Zero PHI transmitted to LLM provider.</div>\n        </div>\n      </li>\n    </ul>\n  </div>\n\n  <div class=\"page-footer\">\n    <div class=\"pf-left\">BTR-2026-NS-03 &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; CR4 &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Confidential &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Bettroi FZE</div>\n    <div class=\"pf-right\">Page 2 of 5</div>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n\n<!-- PAGE 3 — SAMPLE OUTPUT + INTEGRATION ARCHITECTURE -->\n<div class=\"page\">\n  <div class=\"body-content\" style=\"padding-bottom: 12px;\">\n    <div class=\"section-badge\">03 &mdash; Sample Co-Pilot Output</div>\n    <div class=\"section-heading\">What the Patient Experiences</div>\n    <p class=\"body-p\">Below is a representative example of the coaching explanation the AI Brain Coach delivers to a patient after retrieving and analysing their Neurosense360 report.</p>\n    <div class=\"coach-card\">\n      <div class=\"coach-card-label\">AI Brain Coach — Patient Session Example</div>\n      <div class=\"coach-line\"><strong>Hello, [Patient Name].</strong> I&rsquo;ve reviewed your latest Neurosense360 brain scan report dated 18 April 2026. Here is a personalised summary of your results.</div>\n      <div class=\"coach-line\"><strong>What is working well:</strong> Your alpha wave activity in the parietal and occipital regions is within the optimal range for your age group — this reflects good baseline relaxation capacity and visual processing. Your beta coherence between the left and right frontal lobes is balanced, which is associated with stable executive function and decision-making.</div>\n      <div class=\"coach-line\"><strong>Areas that can be improved:</strong> Your theta power in the frontal lobe is slightly elevated above the normative benchmark for your age. This is commonly associated with reduced sustained attention and mental fatigue. Your peak alpha frequency is 0.8 Hz below the age-expected value, which may contribute to the mental sluggishness you may be noticing.</div>\n      <div class=\"coach-line\"><strong>Your personalised intervention protocol — in order of priority:</strong><br>\n        1. Neuro-breathing: 10-minute coherent breathing practice each morning (4 seconds in, 6 seconds out) to stabilise frontal theta.<br>\n        2. Sound therapy: 40 Hz gamma entrainment audio — 20 minutes daily, morning session.<br>\n        3. Meditation: Focused attention practice, 15 minutes, targeting prefrontal activation.<br>\n        4. Nutraceutical support: Lion&rsquo;s Mane + Bacopa formulation — as per your recommended protocol.</div>\n      <div class=\"coach-line\"><strong>Your next step:</strong> Follow this protocol for 4 weeks, then schedule a follow-up Neurosense360 scan to measure changes in your frontal theta and peak alpha frequency. Would you like me to explain any of these findings in more detail?</div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n\n  <hr class=\"divider\">\n\n  <div class=\"body-content\" style=\"padding-top: 10px;\">\n    <div class=\"section-badge\">04 &mdash; Integration Architecture</div>\n    <div class=\"section-heading\">How CR4 Connects to the Existing Platform</div>\n    <div class=\"integration-grid\">\n      <div class=\"int-card\">\n        <div class=\"int-title\">Patient Database Integration</div>\n        <div class=\"int-desc\">Reads from the existing Neurosense360 patient table (Supabase). No new tables required for core functionality. Co-pilot session logs written to a new <code>ai_coach_sessions</code> table (audit + history).</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"int-card\">\n        <div class=\"int-title\">Report Storage Access</div>\n        <div class=\"int-desc\">Retrieves the patient&rsquo;s latest qEEG report PDF and structured metric JSON from existing Supabase storage buckets. Read-only access — no modifications to existing report pipeline.</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"int-card\">\n        <div class=\"int-title\">LLM API Layer</div>\n        <div class=\"int-desc\">New backend microservice (FastAPI) handles prompt construction, PHI stripping, LLM invocation, and response formatting. Deployed alongside existing backend — does not alter existing API routes.</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"int-card\">\n        <div class=\"int-title\">Frontend Embed</div>\n        <div class=\"int-desc\">New <code>&lt;AiCoachPanel /&gt;</code> React component embedded in the existing patient dashboard. Triggered by &ldquo;Talk to My Brain Coach&rdquo; button. No changes to existing screens or navigation.</div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n    <div class=\"tech-row\">\n      <div class=\"tech-label\">Stack additions:</div>\n      <div style=\"display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:4px;\">\n        <span class=\"tech-tag\">FastAPI microservice</span>\n        <span class=\"tech-tag\">Claude API (Anthropic)</span>\n        <span class=\"tech-tag\">Gemini API (Google)</span>\n        <span class=\"tech-tag\">Supabase (existing)</span>\n        <span class=\"tech-tag\">React component</span>\n        <span class=\"tech-tag\">PHI de-identification middleware</span>\n        <span class=\"tech-tag\">Session audit log</span>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n    <p class=\"fn\" style=\"margin-top:8px;\">LLM API usage costs (Claude / Gemini tokens) are billed at actuals and are not included in the fixed CR4 price. Estimated token cost: AED 150&ndash;400 per month depending on active patient volume.</p>\n  </div>\n\n  <div class=\"page-footer\">\n    <div class=\"pf-left\">BTR-2026-NS-03 &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; CR4 &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Confidential &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Bettroi FZE</div>\n    <div class=\"pf-right\">Page 3 of 5</div>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n\n<!-- PAGE 4 — TIMELINE + COMMERCIALS -->\n<div class=\"page\">\n  <div class=\"body-content\" style=\"padding-bottom: 14px;\">\n    <div class=\"section-badge\">05 &mdash; Delivery Timeline</div>\n    <div class=\"section-heading\">10-Day Delivery Plan</div>\n    <div class=\"timeline\">\n      <div class=\"timeline-item\">\n        <div class=\"timeline-dot\"></div>\n        <div class=\"tl-label\">Days 1&ndash;2</div>\n        <div class=\"tl-title\">Integration Setup &amp; Patient Identity Module</div>\n        <div class=\"tl-desc\">Access existing Neurosense360 codebase and database schema. Implement patient identity resolution on session context. Build report retrieval service (read from existing Supabase buckets). PHI stripping middleware. Environment configuration for LLM API keys.</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"timeline-item\">\n        <div class=\"timeline-dot\"></div>\n        <div class=\"tl-label\">Days 3&ndash;5</div>\n        <div class=\"tl-title\">LLM Coaching Engine &amp; Prompt Engineering</div>\n        <div class=\"tl-desc\">Design and test the clinical system prompt encoding Neurosense360&rsquo;s interpretation framework. Build structured report-to-prompt converter. Implement LLM provider abstraction layer (Claude + Gemini switchable). Test coaching output quality against sample patient reports provided by Dr. Shweta&rsquo;s team.</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"timeline-item\">\n        <div class=\"timeline-dot\"></div>\n        <div class=\"tl-label\">Days 6&ndash;7</div>\n        <div class=\"tl-title\">Conversational UI Component &amp; Escalation Logic</div>\n        <div class=\"tl-desc\">Build <code>AiCoachPanel</code> React component and embed in existing patient dashboard. Implement conversational follow-up Q&amp;A with session memory. Build clinical escalation classifier and human-coach redirect flow. Consent capture on first use.</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"timeline-item\">\n        <div class=\"timeline-dot\"></div>\n        <div class=\"tl-label\">Days 8&ndash;9</div>\n        <div class=\"tl-title\">Audit Trail, Testing &amp; Quality Assurance</div>\n        <div class=\"tl-desc\">Implement <code>ai_coach_sessions</code> audit log table. End-to-end testing across patient personas (normal, elevated risk, complex). Regression testing on existing platform screens. Security review: confirm zero PHI in LLM payloads.</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"timeline-item\">\n        <div class=\"timeline-dot\"></div>\n        <div class=\"tl-label\">Day 10</div>\n        <div class=\"tl-title\">Production Deployment &amp; Handover</div>\n        <div class=\"tl-desc\">Deploy to production environment. Smoke testing on live platform. Handover documentation: LLM provider configuration guide, prompt tuning guide, escalation threshold adjustment guide.</div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n\n  <hr class=\"divider\">\n\n  <div class=\"body-content\" style=\"padding-top: 12px;\">\n    <div class=\"section-badge\">06 &mdash; Commercials</div>\n    <div class=\"section-heading\">Investment — CR4 Fixed Price</div>\n    <table class=\"price-table\">\n      <thead>\n        <tr>\n          <th style=\"width:40%;\">Deliverable</th>\n          <th>Basis</th>\n          <th style=\"text-align:right;\">Amount (AED)</th>\n        </tr>\n      </thead>\n      <tbody>\n        <tr>\n          <td><strong>AI Brain Coach Co-Pilot — CR4</strong></td>\n          <td>10 working days &times; AED 450/day — fixed price, all 5 deliverables included</td>\n          <td>AED 4,500</td>\n        </tr>\n        <tr class=\"total-row\">\n          <td colspan=\"2\"><strong>Total Fixed Price (excl. taxes &amp; LLM token costs)</strong></td>\n          <td>AED 4,500</td>\n        </tr>\n      </tbody>\n    </table>\n    <div class=\"pay-cards\">\n      <div class=\"pay-card\">\n        <div class=\"pay-pct\">50%</div>\n        <div class=\"pay-label\">Project Initiation</div>\n        <div class=\"pay-desc\">AED 2,250<br>Due on CR4 sign-off</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"pay-card\">\n        <div class=\"pay-pct\">50%</div>\n        <div class=\"pay-label\">Final Delivery</div>\n        <div class=\"pay-desc\">AED 2,250<br>On production go-live (Day 10)</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"pay-card\" style=\"background: var(--bg);\">\n        <div class=\"pay-pct\" style=\"font-size:13px; color: var(--navy);\">Actuals</div>\n        <div class=\"pay-label\">LLM API Tokens</div>\n        <div class=\"pay-desc\">Claude / Gemini usage billed monthly at cost. Est. AED 150&ndash;400 / month.</div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n\n  <div class=\"page-footer\">\n    <div class=\"pf-left\">BTR-2026-NS-03 &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; CR4 &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Confidential &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Bettroi FZE</div>\n    <div class=\"pf-right\">Page 4 of 5</div>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n\n<!-- PAGE 5 — TERMS + FOOTER -->\n<div class=\"page\">\n  <div class=\"body-content\" style=\"flex: 1;\">\n    <div class=\"section-badge\">07 &mdash; Terms &amp; Conditions</div>\n    <div class=\"section-heading\">Standard Engagement Terms — CR4</div>\n    <ul class=\"terms-list\">\n      <li><strong>Proposal Validity:</strong> This change request proposal is valid for 60 days from the date of issue (20 April 2026).</li>\n      <li><strong>Prerequisite Access:</strong> Bettroi requires read access to the existing Neurosense360 codebase, Supabase project credentials, and 2&ndash;3 sample patient reports (de-identified) for prompt engineering and testing before Day 1 commences.</li>\n      <li><strong>Fixed Price:</strong> AED 4,500 is the fixed price for all five CR4 deliverables as scoped above. LLM API token costs (Claude / Gemini) are billed at actuals monthly and are not included.</li>\n      <li><strong>Scope Boundary:</strong> CR4 covers integration into the existing Neurosense360 patient portal only. Extension to any new platform (Neuro360Q, LimitlessBrainCare, or other) is subject to a separate proposal and pricing.</li>\n      <li><strong>Clinical Disclaimer:</strong> The AI Brain Coach Co-Pilot is a patient education and explanation tool. It does not constitute medical advice or clinical diagnosis. Client is responsible for ensuring appropriate disclaimers are displayed to patients within the platform.</li>\n      <li><strong>Data &amp; PHI:</strong> Zero personally identifiable information will be transmitted to any LLM provider. All AI interactions are logged with audit trail. Client retains full ownership of all patient interaction data.</li>\n      <li><strong>Intellectual Property:</strong> All custom code, prompts, and components developed under CR4 become the property of the client upon project completion.</li>\n      <li><strong>Support &amp; Warranty:</strong> 30-day defect-resolution warranty post go-live. Prompt tuning and model adjustments beyond the warranty period are available under a retainer agreement.</li>\n      <li><strong>Governing Law:</strong> This agreement is governed by the laws of the United Arab Emirates (Dubai jurisdiction).</li>\n    </ul>\n    <div class=\"sig-block\">\n      <div class=\"two-col\" style=\"gap: 30px;\">\n        <div>\n          <div style=\"font-size:9px; font-weight:700; color:var(--muted); letter-spacing:1.5px; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:4px;\">For Bettroi FZE</div>\n          <div class=\"sig-line\"></div>\n          <div class=\"sig-name\">Biji Thomas</div>\n          <div class=\"sig-title\">CEO &amp; Principal Consultant &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Bettroi FZE<br>DTEC-51432 &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Dubai Silicon Oasis, UAE</div>\n        </div>\n        <div>\n          <div style=\"font-size:9px; font-weight:700; color:var(--muted); letter-spacing:1.5px; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:4px;\">For Neurosense / Limitless Brain Lab</div>\n          <div class=\"sig-line\"></div>\n          <div class=\"sig-name\">Dr. Shweta</div>\n          <div class=\"sig-title\">Authorised Signatory &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Date: _______________</div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"footer-band\">\n    <div class=\"footer-left\">\n      <div class=\"f-name\">\n        <img src=\"data:image/png;base64,\" style=\"height:22px;object-fit:contain;\">\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"f-email\">admin@bettroi.com &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; bettroi.com &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; +971 54 714 8580</div>\n    </div>\n    <div class=\"footer-center\">A5, Techno-Hub, DTEC<br>Dubai Silicon Oasis, UAE</div>\n    <div class=\"footer-right\">\n      <div class=\"f-client\">Dr. Shweta &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Neurosense360</div>\n      <div class=\"f-address\">Ref: BTR-2026-NS-03 &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; CR4 &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; 20 April 2026</div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"footer-confidential\">Confidential — Prepared exclusively for Neurosense / Limitless Brain Lab — Not for circulation</div>\n</div>\n\n</body>\n</html>\n",
